name: The Fembots
description: You take Austin Power's place and try to stop Dr. Evil, but you run into the Fembots.  Will you be able to resist their charms?  (Spoiler: probably not.  No cross-mojination here, so your are probably screwed.)  Fembot, seduction, seduce, hypnotize, brainwash, aphrodisiac, spy, secret agent.
creator: stjim
